evidence_summary: All three baseline gates pass: cabal build all (exit 0, no warnings), cabal test (1302 examples, 0 failures, up from 1296 baseline), thesis-conformance-gate.sh (exit 0). All 6 new exports (formatPipelineError, pipelineErrorPhase, pipelineErrorPhaseName, constraintNodeCount, constraintEdgeCount, lookupNode) have Haddock doc-comments and dedicated test cases. No internal modules modified. Implementation matches plan.md step-by-step with no deviations.
